segments.paraphrased_dialogue: My chat says it's your day today. Wait, you're right, it's my day to set everything up!
segments.narrative_relevance: Establishes the friendly, banter-filled lobby environment before the game.
segments.visual_description: Streamer facecam on the left; in-game avatars stand on a cartoon golf course.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: It's Juneteenth today, but I'm not claiming that as my day specifically.
segments.narrative_relevance: Continues the playful teasing among the streamers.
segments.visual_description: The player avatar runs around testing jumping and diving mechanics.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: Wait, you already have a custom skin. Have you played this game before?
segments.narrative_relevance: Questions Squeex's prior experience with the game.
segments.visual_description: Players move near a giant scoreboard showcasing current player models.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: Steam says I have two hours on this, but I swear I have never played.
segments.narrative_relevance: Adds light mystery and comedic denial from Squeex regarding his game history.
segments.visual_description: The avatar jumps around the vibrant green driving range.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: Are you sharing your Steam account? Yes, wait, no! Don't let Steam support hear this.
segments.narrative_relevance: Streamers mock Squeex's accidental admission of account sharing.
segments.visual_description: Squeex's avatar approaches a row of golf carts.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: Let's take this cart for a ride. Wait, how do I drive this?
segments.narrative_relevance: Squeex tests vehicles, highlighting his poor mechanical skills.
segments.visual_description: Squeex's character boards a golf cart and begins driving wildly.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: Uh oh, I flipped it. How do I un-flip this cart?
segments.narrative_relevance: A comedic fail that foreshadows Squeex's early mechanical struggles.
segments.visual_description: The cart hits an obstacle and flips completely upside down.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: I'm just going to leave that there and run back. Bronny is online now.
segments.narrative_relevance: Squeex abandons the flipped cart and joins the rest of the lobby.
segments.visual_description: The avatar runs through forest trees back toward the starting area.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: Is everyone in the lobby? Let's check our settings.
segments.narrative_relevance: Prepares the streamers to begin the actual match.
segments.visual_description: The avatar runs past a giant red mushroom on the golf course.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: I know this isn't competitive, but let's put ten subs on the line.
segments.narrative_relevance: Leslie introduces stakes to the game, creating tension.
segments.visual_description: The avatar drives a new golf cart back into the main hub area.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: So I gift ten subs to the winner, but if I win, everyone gifts me.
segments.narrative_relevance: Shows Leslie establishing competitive rules that favor her.
segments.visual_description: Multiple golf carts gather in the central driving range area.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: That makes no sense! You should gift everyone if you lose.
segments.narrative_relevance: Squeex challenges Leslie's unfair bet proposal.
segments.visual_description: The camera displays a close-up of a smiling character avatar on a giant screen.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: Don't take Juneteenth away from Leslie, let her have her bet.
segments.narrative_relevance: Maintains the group's comedic banter before teeing off.
segments.visual_description: The avatar runs up to a giant camera prop on the course.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: Okay, we will rotate the bet. Who is hosting the game?
segments.narrative_relevance: The streamers finalize the bet rules and start the session.
segments.visual_description: Players line up near the interactive scoreboard screen.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: Let's play 18 holes. Is that too long for everyone?
segments.narrative_relevance: Establishes the length of the upcoming high-stakes match.
segments.visual_description: Squeex's character tests a golf swing on the grassy field.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: Streamers decide to play 18 holes; Squeex asks how to play.
segments.narrative_relevance: Establishes Squeex's complete lack of experience as the match begins.
segments.visual_description: Squeex runs around the golf course lobby, collecting purple items.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: The group agrees on a sub bet where last place pays the winner.
segments.narrative_relevance: Sets up the high stakes of the game with the sub bet.
segments.visual_description: Close-up on Squeex as he transitions to the Sandbanks map screen.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: Squeex hits his first shot and immediately gets a penalty.
segments.narrative_relevance: Introduces Squeex's mechanical struggles on the first hole.
segments.visual_description: Teeing off on Hole 1, Squeex hits the ball high into the air.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: Squeex asks why he got a penalty, learning about water hazards.
segments.narrative_relevance: Highlights Squeex's failure to understand out-of-bounds rules.
segments.visual_description: Squeex chases the ball on the green, suffering multiple penalty strokes.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: Squeex asks if there's a trajectory preview; Leslie says yes.
segments.narrative_relevance: Shows Squeex seeking aiming advice, foreshadowing his later breakthrough.
segments.visual_description: Squeex aims and hits the ball toward a distant island.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: Squeex complains about being hit by other players.
segments.narrative_relevance: Illustrates the early player-versus-player physical targeting.
segments.visual_description: Squeex gets knocked over by another player near the water.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: Other players boast about their shots while Squeex struggles.
segments.narrative_relevance: Highlights Squeex falling behind the rest of the lobby.
segments.visual_description: Character running along a narrow grassy coast following other players.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: Squeex targets Valkyrae with a weapon, causing her to scream.
segments.narrative_relevance: Marks Squeex's first major act of deliberate in-game sabotage.
segments.visual_description: Squeex aims a rifle at Valkyrae and fires, launching her character.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: The group shouts over the chaotic shooting near the hole.
segments.narrative_relevance: Increases the comedic chaos as players fight near the goal.
segments.visual_description: Players scramble near the flag, swinging frantically at their balls.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: Squeex complains about high shots; others tell him to change clubs.
segments.narrative_relevance: Highlights Squeex's struggle with selecting correct golf clubs.
segments.visual_description: Squeex's high shot flies off-course while others sink their putts.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: Squeex struggles to use the putter near the hole.
segments.narrative_relevance: Demonstrates Squeex's frustration trying to complete the first hole.
segments.visual_description: Squeex repeatedly misses short putts near the cup.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: Squeex finishes the hole and realizes he is in last place.
segments.narrative_relevance: Solidifies Squeex's position at the bottom of the scoreboard.
segments.visual_description: Squeex sinks the ball and the leaderboard displays.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: Hole 2 starts on Lone Island; Squeex claims he is new.
segments.narrative_relevance: Begins Hole 2 with Squeex still claiming complete novice status.
segments.visual_description: Hole 2 countdown begins and players take their first swings.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: Squeex asks why he drowned after falling into the water.
segments.narrative_relevance: Shows Squeex's continuing environmental and physical struggles.
segments.visual_description: Squeex's character drowns in the water and respawns via helicopter.
